title: ipomoea scabrida
intro: Ipomoea scabrida, also known as the thorny morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been reported to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antiviral and antifungal activities. Ipomoea scabrida is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the dried leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent, and are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
